title: Dexo
description: Dexo is an additional plugin for Denizen that adds compatibility with the Nexo API, allowing users to work with Nexo blocks, furniture, and items using Denizen scripts.
body:
# Welcome to Dexo --- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/dexo) | [Github](https://github.com/) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.com/) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/WIKI-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://t0lfy.gitbook.io/dexo/)
### ❓ What is Dexo? This is an addon that allows the Denizen plugin to work with objects or items from the Nexo plugin. - New events for blocks or furniture's. - New tags for working with Nexo objects. - New commands ### 📦 Platform - Paper 1.21-1.21.5 ### 🔗 Dependency - [Denizen](https://github.com/DenizenScript/Denizen) - [Nexo](https://polymart.org/product/6901/nexo) ---
